structural_claim: Effective field theories capture emergent phenomena at low energies through renormalized parameters, with high-energy details becoming irrelevant

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical systems exhibit universal behavior at critical points independent of microscopic details
Interacting fermions behave as weakly interacting quasiparticles with renormalized parameters
Coupling constants run with energy scale, with high-energy behavior decoupling from low-energy physics

supporting_results.result_name: Measurement of the strong coupling constant
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: The strong force is characterized by a running coupling that changes with energy scale
